description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior is finished in light gray, likely concrete or stucco, with large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The house features a covered carport on the ground level, with two vehicles visible, and a balcony with glass railings on the first floor. The structure is elevated above a gravel base, with open space beneath part of the building, suggesting flood-resilient or coastal architecture. The interior layout is partially visible, showing open-plan rooms and modern furnishings, while the main entryway is understated with a simple door and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed multi-story house with large windows, a covered carport, and a balcony with glass railings. The exterior is light gray with a minimalist, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main facade with large windows, the main entry door, and a covered carport with two vehicles.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the carport extending under the house and a balcony with glass railings above.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open balcony, more interior details, and additional windows, emphasizing the open-plan layout.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the solid wall with fewer windows and the open space beneath the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal steps, no porch, and no decorative columns or overhangs
